medium_findings.description: Publisher 'yousefcodes' does not match GitHub org 'codeyousef' in repo 'https://github.com/codeyousef/SeenLang.git'

Broad glob pattern used to enumerate all workspace files

info_findings.description: No domain associated with publisher profile
